title: More FlashBack
description: More languages ​​for the FlashBack mod using a resource pack
body:
## Whats is it?
This resource pack contains translations for [**FlashBack**](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) in various languages

- Warning! The mod is not adapted for large sentences in languages ​​other than English.
_Translations may not be accurate*_

- I am not the creator of [**FlashBack**](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) mod

## Other

- Help for translate - [**(O.O)**](https://discord.gg/kQeNShp7Mj)
